attrs.comment: Coastline Resolution Improvement (CRI) filter is applied

baseline_vector_rule.kind: deterministic finite sample from authenticated netCDF numeric data variable
baseline_vector_rule.statement: Flatten the finite entries of the selected baseline variable in netCDF storage order after excluding NaN, infinity, _FillValue, and missing_value; select evenly spaced sample indices across the finite flattened vector.

certified_non_claims: payload bytes are local external data and are not committed to git
no model or deficit-mass vector supplied
no reproducible comparison run output supplied
